issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error handling or edge cases.
The skill file assumes specific OS and GPU configurations, limiting cross-platform compatibility.

scenarios.name: controlnet-cityscape-workflow
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies all rubric requirements, while Response B provides no content.

scenarios.name: docker-compose-comfyui-gpu
scenarios.rationale: Response B meets all rubric requirements, while Response A uses the wrong image, omits models/output volumes, and lacks the required deploy GPU reservation details.
